reference: One of the few likely associations between low back pain and reduced appetite would be constipation. I would increase your fluid intake for now and consider a laxative if it is still no better. Then see your doctor if it lasts more than a day without any bowel movements.
text: One of the few likely associations between low back pain and reduced appetite would be constipation. I would increase your fluid intake for now and consider a laxative if it is still no better. Then see your doctor if it lasts more than a day without any bowel movements.
